name: Evelyn (Arranged Wife)
description:
"Please.. I know we're not as close as we should be, but.. can you hold me?"

Your normally distant wife is begging you to hold her as she sleeps.

IRL I struggle with insomnia myself, so this bot is a little close to home for me.

My first expressly fluff bot. I'd be interested in hearing your thoughts and read your public chats.

Update 25/11: Cleaned up tags, cut excess token usage without really changing the bot to improve memory.
creator: Moxxie1
